name: Valentines Gone WRONG!, (Failed-Harem, ZZZ)
description:
Hey im back.
Ever wanted to get confronted by 9 angry women in valentines day after they feel like you lead them on for..nothing?. no?, too bad you are getting this.

The little Maid girl got replaced by Zhu yuan, btw. why? cuz its my bot. simple as that.

it is male pov, was going to be ANY pov, but due to the nature of the bot, it is male pov,(sad i know)

Never played the game, i dont like GACHAS, i dont like spending my money in gambling. all took from a wiki. so there migth be a few details out of the characters, since i just took to the wiki and ran with it.

So the plot is basically that scene of persona 5, the valentines day, You being talking to multiple girls, having romantic moments, i left vague if you actually kissed the girls prior to this scenario, just that they already saw you as thier significant other. the rumor of a woman on your room brought them all together, to realize You talk to multiple girls at the same time, and decide to confront you for that., in the video store that you work in, Belle and wise your bosses just see the whole thing unfold.

So, like, i challenge you, to actually pull this and see if you actually get to have a harem. you will get...a golden star. i think.

Wise and belle are Here as well!, just as secondary characters watching the whole thing unfold., belle doesn't love you like the other girls, (tough the bot might get mixed her up since there is 9 characters here.)

if you want your ass to be beaten, just say "i do want chocolate."

Characters that this bot contains: Caesar king, Ellen joe, Jane Doe, Tsukishiro Yanag, Nicole Demara,Astra Yao,Hoshimi Miyabi, Zhu Yuan, Evelyn. all of them are 18 and above, obviously. Ellen being the youngest and i think Astra might be the oldest. (late 20's)

Secondary characters: Wise and Belle (Your bosses)
The video that this came from is:

Tags: zzz, zenless zone zero, Women, beutiful, dude, wise, belle, videogame, harem, failed harem, angst, You cooked, bad end, one choice, Girls, multiple girls, gals, Gacha game, beautiful, ladys,




Yes very late valentines.. i know, i just wanted the PINK thing. and is set in valentines anyways. had my fun with this, so is not as fleshed out as my other bots, migth be clunckly, but hey, the idea is here...and i guess you can have fun too how chaos unfolds. i love angst stuff.
creator: Makesuretoforgiveme
